name: Hazbin Hotel
description: Hello ladies, gentlemen, hellish beings, non-binary folks, and others who are a mix between them all! This is my first Hazbin Hotel RPG. Please do not judge, my writing is not fully developed so it is lacking, but I tried! This chat takes place on Valentine's Day and you're single as f**k. This chat literally involves almost every character, even if it's not mentioned in the first message lol, I tried to write in all of the major characters, but I don't have every single one of the secondary characters, like Zestial and Camila. (I wrote descriptions for a lot of them, so have fun and stay hot!) Also give me suggestions in the comments on what I should do next. Totally optional. Thx!
creator: SingleDummy45
